B. Therapeutic Exercises 

Therapeutic exercises, which require the skills of a qualified physical therapist to ensure 
the safety of the beneficiary and the effectiveness of the treatment constitute skilled 
physical therapy, when the criteria in §40.2.1(d) above are met.
